name: Eggs and Chorizo
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir the onion in oil in a 10-inch skillet until tender but not brown.
2. Add the sausage to the skillet. Stir and cook until the sausage is done. Drain excess fat if needed.
3. Mix the eggs, half-and-half, and oregano well with a fork.
4. Pour the egg mixture over the sausage in the skillet.
5. Cook over medium heat. As the egg mixture begins to set at the bottom and sides, gently lift the cooked portion with a fork or spatula so that the uncooked egg mixture can flow under it.
6. Continue cooking until all the eggs are cooked but still moist, about 3 to 5 minutes. Avoid constant stirring as this will make the eggs tough and hard.
